---
title: "Video Demo"
---

::: {.lang-switcher}
[English](./video-demo.html) {.lang-link}
[Español](../es/video-demo.html) {.lang-link}
:::

## Video Demo { .section-title }

The demo gives a fast understanding of what Pythia is, how it works, and why it matters.

::: {.youtube-frame}
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/gkD9bKw1ikY" title="Pythia demo video" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
:::

## Recommended framing

- What problem the project solves
- What the user or evaluator is seeing
- What technical depth sits behind the interface
- Why the final result stands out as both a project and a product
